channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: SOL slips toward the 75–77 zone before a possible bounce. is the drop real? whalish eyes eye a bigger move: 95 by early May. 🫢 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260415-prediction-sol-drops-to-75-before-april-rally #Solana #Crypto #SOL
